text: (2/2) More from #Fendi's SS23 #HauteCouture. Photos by Getty Images https://t.co/pEH4ffeVRw

(1/2) A subtle and beautiful collection, exhibited through effortless elegance. #Fendi's SS23 #HauteCouture collection is exactly as #KimJones intended. In an interview with Vogue on the collection, Jones said  “I wanted a floatiness. Elegant but youthful.” https://t.co/kKPf08j75f
(2/2) Photos by Getty Images
(1/2) These aren't your grandfather's sweaters. 6 colorways from #JWAnderson's SS24 Menswear collection. https://t.co/xPGQtA1bU4

Here's some #Ferragamo red for your midweek blues. 27-year-old, #MaximilianDavis was named #CreativeDirector in 2022 and the young talent has been renewing the label one collection at a time. Fall/Winter '23 pairs sportswear with luxury. https://t.co/XmcSHlQIeZ

Some people believe the most important part of any outfit is the shoes. Here's our roundup of the most notable shoes from #SS23 collections. From #Chanel, #OffWhite, #AcneStudios and more, enjoy our #shoeinspo.

In your opinion, what's the most important part of any outfit? https://t.co/GCA0sojCQw
From, #Versace, #Ferragamo, #IsseyMiyake, #Margiela, and more, there was quite an obsession with hues of the purple variety. Variations include: lavender, indigo, and lilac. https://t.co/SCkYLEdi9t
Got 99 problems but a puffer ain't one. Here's a little taste of puffer style for #FW23 from #BudapestSelect. https://t.co/AiHtakB7Pj

Welcome to #LouisVuitton's aquatic fantasy land. #Mermaidcore and other ethereal themes run throughout the #Resort24 collection which was appropriately held on an island in Italy's lake district. https://t.co/33G96oExox

We are saddened to share that Tina Turner, Queen of Rock, has passed away at age 83. From her iconic music catalogue, unforgettable performances & bold femininity, Tina Turner's music & style will live on forever. We send our deepest condolences to Ms. Turner's family & friends. https://t.co/mhAXo2eJIv
#CannesFilmFestival is in full swing. We're living for this past weekend's red carpet looks from #GigiHadid, #JenniferLawrence, #MichelleYeoh, #NaomiCampbell, and more. https://t.co/eqwig0hV65

Keeping you updated with all the fashion at #CannesFilmFestival. #LilyRoseDepp, #TheWeeknd, #JuliaFox, and more showed up and showed out on the red carpet for "The Idol".  

Lily-Rose Depp - #Chanel
Julia Fox - #NicolasJebran
Jennie - #Chanel
Lena Mahfouf - #VivienneWestwood https://t.co/ExQNHOUzra

History was made. @ngali_australia is the first solo show by an Indigenous designer at #AustralianFashionWeek. #Ngali's collection titled, 'Murriyang' is a celebration of country, water and sky. https://t.co/MYyWfKIkEk

History was made. @ngali_australia is the first solo show by an Indigenous designer at #AustralianFashionWeek. #Ngali's collection titled, 'Murriyang' is a celebration of country, water and sky. https://t.co/N8Zg0xEXlB

Today, #Gucci revealed their #Resort24 collection at the historical, Gyeongbokgung Palace in Seoul. The show features quintessential Gucci motifs along with relaxed fits indicative of holiday style. https://t.co/ca7EKKhNPs

You are now entering a 70s dreamscape. #Alémais kicks off #AAFW with their #Resort24 collection. Pulling inspiration from Return to Oz and David Bowie, the electricity of this show can be felt through the screen. https://t.co/laylHK2JXP

Re-use, reduce, recycle finds its way to #hautecouture. #Parisian brand, @Lena_Erziak wants to limit pollution in the fashion industry. All materials are upcycled from unwanted fabrics that would otherwise turn into waste. https://t.co/WbmbFMhHNS
Subtly transitioning into warm colors. Knitwear designs by @gregojakpe https://t.co/zABqby36R3

Dazzling details. #PacoRabanne #AW23.

Photos courtesy of @gettyimages https://t.co/71WyGvGiB8

A pinch of #Coperni. Amidst the Parisian label's internet-breaking robot demonstration at their RTW23 show, you might have missed this incredible hand-gesture motif throughout the collection. Enjoy.

Photos courtesy of @gettyimages https://t.co/KtTSVo2wVj

Picking my jaw up off the ground. #JodieTurnerSmith stuns in the latest #Schiaparelli bijoux at the premiere for highly anticipated feature film, #MurderMystery starring #JenniferAniston & #AdamSandler. 

Photos courtesy of @schiaparelli, @danielroseburry, & @gettyimages https://t.co/cqRwKhKB2M

Happy Birthday to the legendary, #AlexanderMcQueen. The late designer built a legacy of unbelievable craftsmanship, pragmatism and an unmatched imagination in design that will live on forever. 

Photos courtesy of @gettyimages https://t.co/8XuUYWhNum

Paparazzi princess. #LadyGaga wears #FW23 #Versace at the #Oscars.

2 surprise guests. #Rihanna arrives at the #Oscars red carpet in #MaisonAlaia.

What's your opinion on the looks this year?

Portraits of a Lady. #GiambattistaValli's #FW23 collection has a vintage regality that is expressed through every detail. Ruffles and ruching are carried throughout the collection against pops of pink, sequins, & cherry reds.

What do you think? 

Photos courtesy of @gettyimages https://t.co/rzCVaRbTpP

Print check. #Valentino's #FW23 collection is bursting with bright primary colors that are off-set with black, white and classic prints. From oversized red trench coats to checkered blazers with high shoulders, this season is full of timeless pieces. 

Photos by @gettyimages https://t.co/JY5iihviUG

When you're at the top of every guest list. #Zendaya attended today's #LouisVuitton show in #paris along with soon to be #CreativeDirector, #Pharrell, #EmmaStone and more. 

Photos by @gettyimages https://t.co/WgxjaEJQBM

Spotlight Series:

Bethann Hardison is an advocate in the fashion industry and former model. In the 80s, she took a political approach to her career to fight against racism in the fashion industry & formed the Bethann Management Agency and co-founded the Black Girls Coalition. https://t.co/zqHVwl7Yyu

An iconic duo frontrow at #VivienneWestwood: #JuliaFox and #Halsey leading the most fashionable pack alongside #LawRoach #JaredLeto #LenaMahfouf and more. 

Photos by @gettyimages https://t.co/E8dsO5kBN3

#Anrealage brought color-changing photochromic properties to their FW23 show. The collection explores the intersection of fashion + technology and how our minds interpret the world and organisms in front of us.

Videos by @carolineissa @davinzgarcia
Edited by @alitheacastillo https://t.co/rvV6VFGQyo

This FW23, #OlivierRousteing opted to forego his #BalmainArmy and instead looked to the past to deliver exquisite and timeless silhouettes akin to the house’s creation in the ‘40s whilst paying homage to Pierre #Balmain’s genius. https://t.co/1LjbAkwVRx

#JulienDossena remembers #PacoRabanne for FW23. The collection was a deep dive into #Rabanne’s career & his most iconic looks: the iconic metal mesh, chainmail dresses and handbags, ruched gowns with heart embellishments, and surrealist dresses with Salvador Dali paintings. https://t.co/BRnMgYRgFG

.@MariaGraziaChiuri introduced #Dior’s FW23 show which continues the house’s homage to the iconic women that shaped Dior—this time with #ChristianDior’s sister, Catherine. The collection nodded to ‘50s silhouettes which then turned into modern looks for the woman of today. https://t.co/F9k82XTs8j

Ofcourse, #Naomi opens Ib Kamara’s debut for #OffWhite. ‘Lunar Delivery’ is inspired by space-age Afrofuturism. While the familiar #VirgilAbloh silhouettes were present, Kamara ushered in a newness to the brand: LBDs, fur coats, deep-dyed blazers, striped suits, and more. https://t.co/YoB5OjjM6M

For his debut collection for #NinaRicci, #HarrisReed had model #PreciousLee open the runway in a tulle ballgown whilst other models went down in equally extravagant looks shows clearly where the brand is heading with @harris_reed at the helm. https://t.co/BOCo3RCC3H

In #Coperni’s FW23, they had the Boston Dynamics “spot” robots as a special guest. Recreating the fable “The Wolf and The Lamb”, @riannevanrompaey (as a lamb)’s jacket is being snatched by one of the robots (as a wolf).

Video courtesy of @susiebubble https://t.co/v6ddrbAHor

Looking 🔥 on the frontrow at #Loewe: #Taeyong from #NCT 

#TAEYONGtoPFW23 #TaeyongxLoewe https://t.co/7rSaVNDSEN
Seen frontrow at #Loewe: KPop girl group #NMIXX ❤️‍🔥 #NMIXXatPFW23 #NMIXX_LOEWE https://t.co/LHPlyBiyLM

Care for a little #Givenchy neon green? While most of #MatthewWilliams FW23 collection were focused on dark mature colors, we wanted to celebrate the pops of color he carefully injected into the collection as well. 

Photos by @gettyimages https://t.co/SdZefa6rVH

While we didn't see the iconic anthurium flower make a comeback on the #Loewe runway, model #Emrata did wear the SS23 top for frontrow. #Naomi, #DanLevy, and #GretaLee were also in attendance.

Photos by @gettyimages https://t.co/TxBdELX9Xw

If you see most of #Loewe's recent runways, #JonathanAnderson has somewhat made the brand a niche in the hyperrealism realm but for his FW23 collection, he decided to tone things down a bit and focus on textiles and silhouettes.

Photos by @gettyimages https://t.co/5h77WXpnBm

While the #BalmainArmy wasn't on the runway, it was definitely on the front row at #Balmain's FW23. Stars like #SUNMI, #JessicaAlba, #AshleyGraham, #JordanDunn, #NoahBeck, and more were in attendance.

Photos by @gettyimages https://t.co/EihQaEQEcO

NYC-based @RuiOfficial.me debuted at #PFW showcasing an extension of the buzzy creative’s signature style, featuring body-hugging knits with cut-out detailing. The celeb-approved brand's FW23 collection explored body figures and three-dimensional silhouettes.

Photos by @mljmedia https://t.co/s65E9XqESn

Boxy padded shoulders are making a comeback, just ask #AnthonyVaccarello as he makes the case for the bold statement during #YSL's FW23 show. If you ask us, we're here for the comeback of this office chic silhouette.

Photos by @gettyimages https://t.co/yFSJnLdWVO

The #CostumeDesignersGuildAwards were held in LA honoring their brilliant hard work in the TV and film industry. On the red carpet, designers #BeaAkerlund, #DawnRitz, #MandiLine, & #JennyBeavan wore outfits that called for pay equity that read out the slogans 'Naked Without Us'. https://t.co/ANwPFBvttb

Trust falls and crowd surfing: something you’d never see at a runway show but leave it to #SUNNEI to always give us a fashion showcase worth talking about. The designer duo had their own design team & staff walk the runway while proceeding to crowd surf at the end of the catwalk. https://t.co/9OEttqBeYX

For #AtsushiNakashima's #MFW debut, the designer had but one thing in mind: 'CIRCULARITY'. Without using new materials, he recycled materials from his previous collections to create his FW23 runway show. https://t.co/pxggjURYgj

Spotlight Series: Emerging Black Designers 

Justin P. Etienne is a 26 year old Brooklyn born Haitian Fashion Designer. He taps into his inner child through art and design to challenge the status quo in today’s society. 

Photos courtesy of the designer. https://t.co/ldAUE8FpyM

You're now seeing #DanielLee's first season as #Burberry's creative director. Lee focused on honoring the fashion house's rich history by bringing back the 122-year old 'Equestrian Knight' logo which is seen in one of the dresses that went down the runway. https://t.co/jzzaual309

Wrapping out our #BAFTA red carpet favorites with #Hoyeon, #YvonneOrji, #BarryKeoghan, #GeriHalliwell, #MichelleYeoh, #AngelaBassett, and more.

Spotlight Series: Emerging Designers 

Blu started his brand WNTD Apparel in 2014. WNTD is a double entendre, playing off the word “wanted” and as an acronym for (W)hat (N)ot (T)o (D)o.

Photos courtesy of designer https://t.co/7FdVqdSAwW

Recently named as #CFDA's Emerging Designer of the Year, #ElenaVelez returns to #NYFW with YR003. Continuing her artistry with canvas, cotton, and metal by way of ripping, binding, and finding new ways to make a piece truly @ElenaVelez. 

Photos by @ashjacque https://t.co/S6RpBpGGNI

It's official: #PharrellWilliams is returning to #LouisVuitton not as a collaborator but as its new Men's Creative Director. The singer/songwriter's first collection will debut in June 2023 for Men's #FashionWeek in Paris. https://t.co/DSAQLl3Lwe

Singer/Songwriter #PharrellWilliams is reportedly going to take over the role of the late #VirgilAbloh as overseer of the #LouisVuitton Menswear line as reported by WSJ. @Pharrell would be @LouisVuitton's first permanent head of menswear since @VirgilAbloh passed in late 2021. https://t.co/bOkbFHa8JG

Ellae Lisque designer Maxie J. states, “I could not shake the passion for building my brand and I couldn’t imagine myself doing anything else. My plan B was always to make my plan A work.” https://t.co/yfkXanLciz

Checking in from the Black in Fashion Council Discovery Showroom, supported by @Shopify, at #NYFW. Here's an inside look at the collections of the 10 ambitious designers featured this season. https://t.co/9C8p6iEDXH

Spotlight Series: Black Impact
Láolú Senbanjo otherwise known as “Láolú NYC,” is a Nigerian bred, Brooklyn based performance and visual artist, singer, songwriter, musician, human rights lawyer, and activist. Láolú has always sought to help others reveal their truth. https://t.co/c081aOz0sZ

Last night, #Rihanna performed at the #Superbowl with baby no. 2. The singer and beauty mogul wore a custom #Loewe breastplate and jumpsuit with an #Alaia coat which was a tribute to legendary fashion editor #AndreLeonTalley.

Spotlight Series - Black Impact 

Pat McGrath, fondly known as “Mother” by her army of cult followers and fans is the fashion industry’s most iconic makeup artist and owner of Pat McGrath Labs.  Anna Wintour has dubbed her “the most influential makeup artist in the world.” https://t.co/sv0C2pIGiC

"Please don't eat my friends" is what @CollinaStrada dubbed their latest collection. Many of the models, few of whom are the designer's friends, wore animal prosthetics on the models' faces in the shape of amphibians, rabbits, and more. https://t.co/353ntEhfOT

Vibe shift 😍 Mystical moments from #Rodarte's Fall 2023 show. #IMGFashionAlliance

Always one to turn heads, the #StreetsAtNYFW never disappoints. Which fit from #NYFW is your fave?

It wouldn’t be a #ChristianSiriano show without all the drama—especially with his muse, #CocoRocha, giving us the high fashion glamour we so desperately needed. @CSiriano kicks off #NYFW and the entire Fashion Month on a high note. See more of the show in our stories. https://t.co/8Y0B74FnFc

Last week, #MarcJacobs finally returned to the runway after a 3-year hiatus. The show was attended by some of his closest friends with an impressive frontrow by the likes of #EmilyRatajkowski, #AshleyGraham, #DebbieHarry, #DebiMazar, #AnnaWintour #NickyHilton, and more. https://t.co/YPqKoGAkY1

Spotlight Series: Black Impact
#OlivierRousteing became the Creative Director of #Balmain at 24 in 2011. He has been successful in building a recognizable brand identity informed by the brand's magnificent archives, intricate craftsmanship, & mastery of couture tradition. ⁠
⁠ https://t.co/PfwUo5DDfk

It's the night of the dramatic trains. From #DojaCat, #Anitta, #JLo, #EllaMai, and many more the #Grammys red carpet exuded extravagance and glamour with beautiful gowns that brought in a little oomph with a train. 

Photos from @gettyimages https://t.co/ZhF42fcvWs

Leave it to #Lizzo to make an unforgettable entrance at the #Grammys red carpet! Her floral orange coat when opened reveals a beautiful form-fitting corset dress underneath.

At tonight's #Grammys, #CardiB stuns at the red carpet in a custom #GuaravGupta piece from the designer's recent #HauteCouture runway. We also can't get over her full-metal presenter look onstage (swipe to the last frame). 

 Photos from @gettyimages https://t.co/my9RfVU0Ih

The #Grammys has always served us the most unforgettable fashion moments of all time. Swipe to see some our favorites like #JLo in #Versace, #LadyGaga in #ArmaniPrive, #CardiB in vintage #Mugler, and #GraceJones in the most avant-garde look the carpet has ever seen at the time. https://t.co/o1hDxJ4KBc

World-renowned designer #PacoRabanne has passed away at the age of 88. Come down memory lane as we pay tribute to the designer's most influential avant-garde looks at the height of his space-age aesthetic runways.

You're looking at the intricate mind of Indian designer, #GauravGupta, at his first #HauteCouture show. The collection follows "Shunya", an Indian concept meaning zero. Designer, Sam Harper of @harpercollective developed the fabric technique for her beloved 'Bubble Sleeves'. Harper's inspired by the hair accessories that she wore growing up. https://t.co/xU3mEEuC9u

@naomigilon has entered the chat with a unique medium: ceramics. The neon green bag is composed without a plaster mold, but with the modeling technique. His work questions popular culture by bringing together the sublime and the terrifying.

#BlackHistoryMonth is coming up and we want to hear from you! 

We will be highlighting Industry Leaders  (emerging and established) on our Instagram in February. Reply with who you think we should spotlight. ⬇️

Designers, models, photographers, executives, stylists✨

Welcome to @hoda_kova world, where clocks are shirts and belts are purses. The brand which was founded in 2021 by Ellen Hodakova Larsson has already caught the attention of #KylieJenner who was seen grasping a White Buckle Baguette Bag

Photos courtesy of designer and @roarvale https://t.co/xbnWrdwYTu

#BottegaVeneta ditches their signature woven style for the recently released, Double-Knot spaghetti bag. The brand has perfectly named this sandy beige tone, 'Porridge'.

Photo courtesy of @styleappetite https://t.co/iY1GMUOQsp

We're in a hybrid footwear frenzy. #AncutaSarca launched her eponymous label in 2019 and already has a long list of famous clients. From #DuaLipa to #BellaHadid, everyone is dying to get their hands on the upcycled shoes and accessories. 

Photos courtesy of designer https://t.co/XeDCK3bHWY

Supercharged cowboy energy. #Goomheo's #SS23 collection titled, Dystopian Beach, reconstructs classic western tropes and manipulates denim and leather to elevate an iconic aesthetic. ⁠
⁠
Photos by @anjamayehats and @goomheo⁠ https://t.co/uZPz8SjLbL
